Palladium - Individual Market Analysis

CoT signals and diagnostics for Palladium futures.

As of 2026-03-03

Gemini Summary

Signal Summary:

  • Configuration statement: Given a Spec_zscore of 1.21, a Spec_Net_%OI of 3.96%, and a positive 4-week Flow of 1.35, this setup aligns with Upward-biased price paths and Normal volatility, where the dominant risk is Trend continuation, not Squeeze risk.
  • The signal currently occupies a "Hedgers_Deep_Short" regime characterized by "Hedger_Covering" market structure and moderate tension (1).
  • Conviction Band: Medium. Interpretation Confidence: High Confidence. Internal Conflict Flag: No. Signal Stability Assessment: Improving. Threshold Proximity: Moderate. Revision Sensitivity: Unknown.

Methodology Applied:

  • Spec_zscore >= 2: Identifies "Crowded Long" conditions, signaling extreme fragility and high drawdown sensitivity (1).
  • Multi-week flow change (Flow_4w): Serves as the primary timing signal for directional shifts and reliable dynamic momentum (1).
  • Hedger Pressure Regime: Analyzes commercial positioning to identify supply expansion pressure or shortage stress (1).
  • NYME Palladium Futures: Latest observation date 2026-03-03 (1).

Key Dynamics:

  • The primary driver is the shift from negative to positive speculative net positioning (3.96%), supported by a persistent "Long_Build" flow label (1).
  • Momentum has stabilized after a peak in flow strength (7.32 on 2025-12-16), indicating more measured trend absorption (1).
  • Conditional Invalidation: A reversal in the 4-week flow to "Long_Reduction" or the Spec_zscore breaching the +2.0 "Crowded Long" threshold (1).
  • Persistence: Speculative positioning has shown steady improvement from -5.6% to +3.9% over the recent lookback (1).

Scenario Balance:

  • Base case dominant: Continued price support as speculators build length and commercials cover shorts.
  • Upside secondary: Geopolitical supply shocks triggering non-linear moves in this thin-liquidity market (1).
  • Downside residual: Profit-taking leading to trend exhaustion if Spec_zscore enters the extreme stretch zone.

Time Horizon & Aggregation:

  • Time Horizon: Tactical (weeks) based on the methodology’s reliance on 4-week flow momentum for timing (1).
  • Aggregation Weight Hint: Medium; while the signal is clear, the market's thin liquidity and high concentration can lead to noise (1).

Macro Relevance:

  • Informs industrial metal demand and supply-side liquidity.
  • Economic mechanism: Positioning tension measures market fragility and tail-risk amplification within supply-concentrated environments (1).
  • Cycle position: Not determined.

Regime Context:

  • The "Hedgers_Deep_Short" regime is persistent throughout the provided history.
  • Direction: Stabilising Spec_zscore suggests a transition from extreme bearishness toward moderate bullish conviction (1).

Model Limitations:

  • Thin market liquidity and supply concentration (Russia/South Africa) create unstable historical baselines (1).
  • High noise levels in single-week moves; requires multi-week confirmation (1).

Data & References:

  • NYME Palladium Positioning (2026-03-03).
  • Spec_zscore (1.21) and Flow_4w (1.35) are the most influential current data points (1).
  • Additional datasets: Geopolitical risk indicators and multi-week spot price volatility would improve context.
